nasb.text: The water decreased steadily until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, the tops of the mountains became visible.

esv.text: And the waters continued to abate until the tenth month; in the tenth month, on the first day of the month, the tops of the mountains were seen.

cnv.text: 水繼續消退，直到十月；到了十月初一，山頂都露出來了。

ccb.text: 水继续消退，到十月一日，山顶都露出来了。

csbs.text: 水继续减退，直到十月。十月一日，众山顶都显露出来了。
